title: ZXSnake
description: ZXSnake is a retro-inspired arcade snake game in the ZX Series, featuring classic gameplay, unlockable themes, achievements, and modern controls.
heroImageAlt: ZX Series arcade game collection featuring ZX Snake, ZX Brick and ZX Space

sections.heading: What is ZXSnake?
paragraphs: ZXSnake is part of the ZX Series and keeps classic snake movement simple, fast, and replayable.
Use the guide pages to move through setup, controls, and progression with one short section per topic.

featureShowcases.heading: ZXSnake at a glance
featureShowcases.summary: Overview shows ZXSnake as a ZX Series survival arcade game.
body: This view helps players move from discovering the game to understanding how it plays. ZXSnake is presented around snake survival runs, so players can see the core loop before reading deeper guides.
Players use this page to decide where to go next: setup, controls, game modes, progression, screenshots, or support topics.
bullets: Breaks down the core arcade loop.
Take players from the game landing page into these gameplay guides.
Keeps public wording focused on player experience and supported features.

image.caption: ZXSnake gameplay artwork introduces the app and its core loop.

featureShowcases.heading: Progression and support topics
featureShowcases.summary: ZXSnake guide pages connect gameplay with leaderboards, achievements, BarkinMad Coins, tips, FAQ, and screenshots.
body: This matters because ZX Series pages are not only image galleries. They should explain how the player moves from learning the game into repeated play and progress tracking.
Players use these supporting pages after the first session to understand goals, scoring surfaces, unlocks, and practical tips.
bullets: Learn how gameplay to progression and support pages.
Keeps guide flow consistent across the ZX Series.
Uses existing artwork as placeholders where page-specific screenshots are not available.

image.caption: Use this artwork to confirm your next gameplay goals before the next session.
